text: "+" (THE HOSPITAL) TO INCREASE

! WELCOME TO THE SECRET ADVENTURE!WE HID THIS REGION AND LEFT IT OFF THE MAP IN THE MANUAL TO IL-LUSTRATE AN IMPORTANT POINT: SOMETIMES THE BEST MAPS IN AD- VENTURE GAMES ARE THE ONES THAT ONLY TELL YOU PART OF THE STORY!(SOMETIMES THEY MAY EVEN LIE!) THIS ADVENTURE WILL GIVE YOU LOTS OF CHANCES TO PRACTICE YOURSKILLS IN DEALING WITH BOTH HOS-TILE AND FRIENDLY CREATURES THATYOU'LL FIND IN THE 3 "BASE SETS"AVAILABLE FOR YOUR USE. LOOK FOR MONSTERS YOU'LL WANT TO USE IN THE GAMES YOU WANT TO DESIGN.SINCE YOU CAN MAKE EVERY MONSTERAND PERSON A LITTLE BIT DIFFER- ENT FROM EVERYONE ELSE WITH THE SAME NAME AND PICTURE, DON'T AS-SUME THAT EVERY DWARF YOU SEE CARRYING AN AXE WILL BEHAVE AND PERFORM IN THE SAME WAY. ONE MAY BE STRENGTH 10, ANOTHER 100 ONCE YOU'VE PLAYED THROUGH THIS ADVENTURE, YOU MAY WANT TO USE THE CONSTRUCTION SET TO COME BACK AND EXAMINE SOME OF THE CREATURES AND SEE HOW THEY WERE "PROGRAMMED". MAKE SURE TO USE THE HOSPITAL SQUARE AND READY A WEAPON BEFORE STARTING OUT!

LAND OF AVENTURIA
LAND OF AVENTURIA

YOU ARE IN A CELL BENEATH A NAZICASTLE DURING WORLD WAR II. TRYTO FIND THE SECRET PLANS AND ESCAPE. USE THE RED CROSSES TO KEEP YOUR LIFE FORCE HIGH--THE GUARDS ARE WELL-ARMED AND DAN- GEROUS! TO EXIT, GO THROUGH THEBOTTOM DOOR OF THIS ROOM. THIS MINI-ADVENTURE SHOWS HOW YOU CAN MAKE ONE ROOM INTO MANY ROOMS. NOTE THE SMALL ROOM IN THE CORNER THAT YOU CAN'T REACH FROM HERE! IF YOU FIND YOUR WAYBLOCKED BY AN OBJECT YOU CAN'T PICK UP (I.E. YOU ALREADY OWN 1)DROP THE OLD ONE BEHIND YOU 1ST.IF YOU'RE HAVING TROUBLE GETTINGTO THE REST OF THE ROOM, TRY GOING THROUGH A DOOR THAT SEEMS TO LEAD IN THE WRONG DIRECTION IN ORDER TO WORK YOUR WAY BACK FROM ANOTHER ANGLE. YOU CAN GETTO THE STAIRWAY WITHOUT USING ANY HIDDEN DOORS--KEEP TRYING! "YOU MUST SOLVE THE MURDER OF MYPOOR, SWEET BROTHER JONATHAN!" THE WOMAN SOBS. "I SHALL NOT REST UNTIL OUR FAMILY HAS BEEN AVENGED! AND THEY STOLE THE PRETTY STATUE OF OUR FAMILY EM- BLEM, A HAWK IN FLIGHT. IT'S PROBABLY NOT WORTH MUCH, BUT...""ALL RIGHT, I ADM

IF YOU FIND YOUR WAYBLOCKED BY AN OBJECT YOU CAN'T PICK UP (I.E. YOU ALREADY OWN 1)DROP THE OLD ONE BEHIND YOU 1ST.IF YOU'RE HAVING TROUBLE GETTINGTO THE REST OF THE ROOM, TRY GOING THROUGH A DOOR THAT SEEMS TO LEAD IN THE WRONG DIRECTION IN ORDER TO WORK YOUR WAY BACK FROM ANOTHER ANGLE. YOU CAN GETTO THE STAIRWAY WITHOUT USING ANY HIDDEN DOORS--KEEP TRYING! "YOU MUST SOLVE THE MURDER OF MYPOOR, SWEET BROTHER JONATHAN!" THE WOMAN SOBS. "I SHALL NOT REST UNTIL OUR FAMILY HAS BEEN AVENGED! AND THEY STOLE THE PRETTY STATUE OF OUR FAMILY EM- BLEM, A HAWK IN FLIGHT. IT'S PROBABLY NOT WORTH MUCH, BUT...""ALL RIGHT, I ADM
